cards.back: A mathematical model that describes the degradation or distortion of a pristine image into a degraded one
A function that describes how a point source of light degrades into a spread-out image due to the optical system of the imaging device
A mathematical model that describes the PSF of an optical system, which is used to simulate and predict the degradation of an image
A mathematical filter that minimizes the mean square error between the degraded and original images, commonly used for image restoration
A mathematical model that describes the optical system of an imaging device, including the PSF, used to simulate and predict the degradation of an image
